title: Monday workdoc edit timestamp
excerpt:
Hello, 
It could be nice to have the possibility to store in a column the last edit timestamp for a monday workdoc. 
Thank you 
Corentin

posts.author: corentin.dalfarra (AB testing)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

It could be nice to have the possibility to store in a column the last edit timestamp for a monday workdoc.

Thank you

Corentin

posts.author: Vtab (Vero Tabares)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be GREAT if we could add timestamps within Workdocs. We’d like to use Workdocs as a way of unifying communication/collaboration (Updates on crack) across boards and this would help us keep conversions organized.

posts.author: Rach12 (Rachael )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi All! just wondering if this ever got any traction?
